heading: Rank: warrant officers
label: 7225 Rank: warrant officers
text: Warrant officers rank next below second lieutenants and rank among themselves within each warrant officer grade under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of the Army.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)357510:593 (less 1st sentence).(less 1st sentence), ; , .Aug. 21, 1941, ch. 384, § 455 Stat. 653May 29, 1954, ch. 249, § 19(e)68 Stat. 16710:593 (2d sentence) is omitted as executed. The words “within each warrant officer grade” are inserted for clarity, since covers rank between warrant officers in different warrant officer grades.section 745 of this title
Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 7225 to 7228 were renumbered sections 8625 to 8628 of this title, respectively.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 3575 of this title
